title: Section 37
content: 1[37. General finality of decrees and orders of Small Cause Court--Save as otherwise provided by this Chapter or by any other enactment for the time being in force, every decree and order of the Small Cause Court in a suit shall be final and conclusive.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 1 of 1895, s. 13, for Chapter VI.
